channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Vodacom Upgrades M-Pesa with USD 28 Million Platform to Boost Digital Finance
item.description: On 2nd April 2026, Vodacom Tanzania officially launched the M-Pesa Fintech 2.0 platform, investing USD 28 million to modernize its mobile money system. This new generation platform is designed to hand...

item.title: Celebrity Heights and Weights: How 140 Pounds Looks Across Different Builds
item.description: This article highlights 25 well-known celebrities who each weigh 140 pounds in 2026, showing how their height greatly affects how this weight appears on their body. Heights range from 5 feet 2 inches ...

item.title: Cotabato Highway Patrol Officer Injured in Motorcycle Shooting Incident
item.description: A policeman from the Cotabato Provincial Highway Patrol Team was wounded in an attack by two men riding a motorcycle in Matalam town, Cotabato on May 12, 2026. Police Senior Master Sgt. Noel Demate su...

item.title: Heineken House Brings Sport, Music and Culture Together in Lagos
item.description: For one full week in May, Lagos gbam-bam style hosted the Heineken House Experience, turning Ilubirin into correct hub for football, Formula 1, music, and social connection. The event ran alongside UE...

item.title: Understanding Core Nigerian Values and Their Role in Society
item.description: Nigerian values na the guiding principles wey dey shape how people dey live, work, and relate with each other across the country. Dem dey rooted for culture, religion, and the history of more than 220...

item.title: The Life and Career of Clotilde von Derp: Pioneering Expressionist Dancer
item.description: Clotilde von Derp, born Clotilde Margarete Anna Edle von der Planitz in 1892, was a groundbreaking German expressionist dancer and one of the early figures in modern dance. She began her professional ...

item.title: Trump's Visit to China Sparks Viral Mockery on Chinese Social Media
item.description: During President Donald Trump's visit to China to meet with Xi Jinping, Chinese social media users openly mocked him in a way that surprised CNN anchor Erin Burnett. Despite the strict government cens...

item.title: NBI clarifies it was not involved in Senate shooting, will investigate independently
item.description: The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) has officially denied any involvement in the recent gunfire incident that occurred within the Senate premises. In response to the incident, the NBI announced...

item.title: Court to Decide on Cardiologist’s Testimony in Gachagua Impeachment Proceedings
item.description: The impeachment case involving former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua is set to continue in court, with a key issue being whether renowned cardiologist Dr. Daniel Kibuka Gikonyo will be cross-examin...

item.title: Informal Sharing of PrEP Pills in South African Communities Raises Health Concerns
item.description: In parts of southern Johannesburg, including Soweto, Finetown and Orange Farm, some people using PrEP (pre-exposure prophylaxis) are sharing their HIV prevention pills in informal community groups oft...

item.title: A Look at Jayne Mansfield’s Rise to Fame and Iconic 1950s Style

item.title: Olievenhoutbosch residents deliver memorandum to Tshwane mayor over years of stalled housing and service delivery issues
item.description: On Tuesday, residents of Olievenhoutbosch marched to the Tshwane mayor’s office to hand over a memorandum addressing what they described as more than 11 years of neglect and ongoing failures in servic...

item.title: New Research Reveals Remoras Can Exhibit Parasitic Behavior in Manta Rays

item.title: Trump States He Does Not Consider Americans' Finances in Decision-Making, GOP Lawmakers Hesitate to Respond

item.title: European air fares set to rise due to high jet fuel costs
item.description: Air fares in Europe are expected to rise steadily due to surging jet fuel prices, according to Willie Walsh, head of the International Air Transport Association. While some airlines have temporarily r...
